name: Document Preview Panel
uri: N/A — rendered inline within the workspace (no dedicated route); preview asset fetched from GET /api/documents/{id}/preview
notes: React class component conditionally rendered by App when showPreview=true; receives `document` object and `onClose` callback as props.
Renders three mutually exclusive content branches based on file_type: PDF (react-pdf / with pdf.js CDN worker), image (), and unsupported-type fallback text.
PDF lifecycle state (numPages, pageNumber, loading, error) is managed in component state; page navigation UI is absent — component always renders page 1.
Imports formatFileSize() from DocumentGrid.jsx — a cross-component dependency on an 800-line god component, flagged as an anti-pattern in source comments.
